summary: Comprehensive testing of TabPilot Chrome Extension Preview (iteration 5). All 15 new features/fixes tested and verified working. Backend API 7/7 tests passed. Frontend UI 100% functional with all new features implemented correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/ returns 200 with correct message
Backend: GET /api/sessions returns session list
Backend: POST /api/sessions creates session with correct data persistence
Backend: DELETE /api/sessions/{id} removes session correctly
Backend: POST /api/suggestions creates suggestion successfully
Backend: POST /api/suggestions works with empty name (optional)
Backend: POST /api/suggestions rejects missing message (422)
Frontend: Sidebar resize handle visible and functional (280px-700px range) - tested 380px→480px→330px
Frontend: No fake browser chrome bar (tabpilot.dev NOT present)
Frontend: Tab groups visible with correct colors - Work (blue #8ab4f8), Research (green #81c995), Media (red #f28b82), Shopping (yellow #fdd663)
Frontend: Tab group headers have colored dots and collapsible
Frontend: Tab alignment correct - ungrouped tabs at root level, grouped tabs indented (pl-2)
Frontend: Help panel opens via help-toggle-btn with ? icon
Frontend: Help panel has 'How to Use' and 'Suggest' tabs (data-testid='help-tab-help', 'help-tab-suggest')
Frontend: Help panel shows Quick Tips and Keyboard Shortcuts
Frontend: Privacy disclaimer visible with 'never collect, store, or transmit' content
Frontend: Suggestion form has name input, message textarea, submit button
Frontend: Suggestion form POSTs to /api/suggestions successfully - success toast shown
Frontend: Heatmap panel shows BOTH hours AND visit counts in header (13.9h | 1306 visits)
Frontend: Heatmap 'Most Used Tabs' shows both time AND visit count per tab (e.g. '2h 22m 47v')
Frontend: Heatmap time filters present (Day/Week/Month/Custom buttons with data-testid)
Frontend: Heatmap Day filter works - changes chart title and data
Frontend: Heatmap Month filter shows 'This Month (hours/week)'
Frontend: Heatmap Custom filter shows date range inputs (From/To)
Frontend: Heatmap description text removed - only header with stats
Frontend: Bar chart and timeline chart render correctly in heatmap
Frontend: Search suggestions dropdown appears when typing in search bar (tested 'git' → 2 suggestions)
Frontend: Domain view shows domains as clean cards with favicons, chevrons, tab counts, and active indicators (12 domain groups)
Frontend: Mute button visible on hover for ALL tabs (not just audible ones) - tested with tab 101 (non-audible)
Frontend: Unsuspend All button present (data-testid='action-unsuspend-all') and functional with toast
Frontend: Unmute All button present (data-testid='action-unmute-all') and functional with toast 'All tabs unmuted'
Frontend: Command Palette opens with Cmd+K (data-testid='command-palette')
Frontend: Command Palette shows all tabs with favicons and supports fuzzy search (tested 'git' → 1 result)
Frontend: Command Palette closes with Escape key
Frontend: Tab Notes panel accessible (data-testid='notes-toggle-btn') with 3 existing notes
Frontend: Tab Notes panel shows notes with Edit/Remove options
Frontend: Smart Workspaces panel accessible (data-testid='workspaces-toggle-btn')
Frontend: 4 workspace presets with Activate buttons (Deep Work, Meetings, Research, Break Time)
Frontend: Dark theme active by default
seed_data_creation: Test suggestion created during suggestion form test. Existing mock data used for tab notes (3 notes from INITIAL_TAB_NOTES in mockData.js)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 15 new features from the latest iteration are implemented and working. Key data-testid attributes verified: sidebar-resize-handle, help-toggle-btn, help-tab-help, help-tab-suggest, privacy-disclaimer, suggestion-form, suggestion-name-input, suggestion-message-input, suggestion-submit-btn, heatmap-filter-day/week/month/custom, heatmap-custom-from/to, command-palette, command-palette-input, command-palette-results, notes-toggle-btn, tab-notes-panel, workspaces-toggle-btn, workspace-manager, action-unsuspend-all, action-unmute-all, tab-group-header-{1-4}, domain-view, domain-group-{domain}, search-suggestions, search-suggestion-{id}, tab-mute-{id}. The app uses mock data via mockData.js for Chrome tab simulation.

mocked_integrations.Chrome tabs API: Simulated via mockData.js and useMockTabs.js hook - all tab data is mock
